operations.description: Retrieves the profile information of the currently authenticated user.
Updates the profile information of the currently authenticated user.
Retrieves the profile information of a specific user by their ID.
Uploads a new avatar image for the currently authenticated user. Replaces the existing avatar if one exists.
Retrieve a paginated list of activities with optional search, filter, and sort options.
Creates a new activity with the provided information. Requires SuperAdmin or Manager role.
Retrieve detailed information for a specific activity by its ID. Students must pass programEnrollmentId.
Updates the details of a specific activity by its ID. Requires SuperAdmin or Manager role.
Soft-deletes an activity by its ID. Requires SuperAdmin or Manager role.
Creates activity progress for a module enrollment and sets status to InProgress. Requires Student role.
Marks an activity as Done for the given module enrollment and recalculates module/program progress. Requires Student role.

Test-only endpoint that forces any activity to Done for a given student, bypassing all business rules (enrollment status, ownership, activity type, sequential lock, schedule windows). The module enrollment is resolved automatically. Requires Mentor or Manager role.
Retrieve an assignment by its ID. Students must have an active enrollment in the assignment's module.
Updates an assignment by its ID. Requires SuperAdmin or Manager role.
Soft-deletes an assignment by its ID. Requires SuperAdmin or Manager role.
Creates a new assignment for a module. Requires SuperAdmin or Manager role.
Student turns in a FileUpload assignment. Quizzes and retrospectives use their dedicated endpoints. Provide ContentText and/or FileUrl.
Returns a FileUpload submission. Access is enforced per role.
Uploads a deliverable file to S3 only (no DB write) and returns the file URL for use in submit.
Mentor, Manager, or SuperAdmin grades a turned-in submission against the assignment's pass score, or returns it for revision. Grading recalculates module and program progress.
Creates a new user account with the provided registration information.
Authenticate user and return JWT tokens.
Logs out the currently authenticated user.
Sends a password reset link to the specified email if it exists.
Reset user password using token sent to email.
Refresh JWT access token using a valid refresh token.
Resend OTP to user's email for registration or password reset.
Verify OTP for email confirmation and activate account.
Retrieve a paginated list of cohort classes with basic information only. Use GET /api/classes/{id} for full details including SeatsTaken.
Creates a new class cohort in Draft status. Requires SuperAdmin or Manager role.

Retrieve class details including active enrolled students. Students may view the roster only for a class they are actively enrolled in. SuperAdmin and Manager may view any class roster. Mentors may only view classes they own.
Retrieve class details including all scheduled sessions for the cohort, ordered by start time.
Retrieve detailed information for a specific class cohort by its ID, including SeatsTaken.
Updates class cohort details. Status changes must use Open, Start, or Complete endpoints. Requires SuperAdmin or Manager role.
Transitions a class from Draft to Open. Requires SuperAdmin or Manager role.
Transitions a class from Open to InProgress. Requires SuperAdmin or Manager role.
Transitions a class from InProgress to Completed. Requires SuperAdmin or Manager role.
Joins a class cohort within an active program enrollment. The selected class must belong to the same program. Requires Student role.
Moves the student from the current class to another cohort within the same program. Requires Student role.
Retrieve a class enrollment. Students see their own; parents see linked students; admins see all.
Lists class enrollments for a program enrollment. Access is enforced per role.
Retrieve a paginated list of scheduled sessions for a class cohort.
Schedules a new session for a class cohort. Requires SuperAdmin or Manager role.
Retrieve class session details including attendance roster. Students receive only their own row; mentors, managers, and super admins receive the full roster.
Retrieve detailed information for a specific class session.
Updates a scheduled class session. Requires SuperAdmin or Manager role.
Soft-deletes a class session. Requires SuperAdmin or Manager role.
Retrieve a paginated list of courses with optional search, filter, and sort options.
Creates a new course with the provided information. Requires SuperAdmin or Manager role.
Retrieve detailed information for a specific course by its ID.
Updates the details of a specific course by its ID. Requires SuperAdmin or Manager role.
Soft-deletes a course by its ID. Requires SuperAdmin or Manager role.
Retrieve a single course by its exact name (case-insensitive).
Retrieve a paginated list of experts with optional search, filter, and sort options.
Creates a new expert with the provided information. Requires SuperAdmin or Manager role.
Retrieve detailed information for a specific expert by its ID.
Updates the details of a specific expert by its ID. Requires SuperAdmin or Manager role.
Soft-deletes an expert by its ID. Requires SuperAdmin or Manager role.
Assigns a program to an expert. Optional request body may include RoleInBoard. Requires SuperAdmin or Manager role.
Updates the program assignment for an expert. Requires SuperAdmin or Manager role.
Removes a program assignment from an expert. Requires SuperAdmin or Manager role.
Creates a highlight stack for a student in a program and starts the first video job. If StudentId is omitted, the authenticated user from the JWT is used.
Lists highlight stacks for a program and student. If studentId is omitted, the authenticated user from the JWT is used.
Retrieves one highlight stack and its video items by stack ID.
Soft-deletes a highlight stack and all of its video items.
Starts a trim job that excludes the given time ranges from a completed highlight video.
Inserts a source media segment into the highlight manifest by source timeline order and re-encodes.
Soft-deletes one highlight video item so another can be generated in the stack.
Retrieve all invoices issued for the current user (student or parent), sorted by most recent.
Returns the details of an invoice by its Invoice ID.
Returns the invoice created automatically after a successful payment. Returns 404 if the payment has not been confirmed.

Uploads learning material to S3 for a SelfPaced activity. Supported formats: PDF (≤50 MB), DOC/DOCX (≤50 MB), Video .mp4/.mov/.avi/.mkv (≤3 GB), Image .jpg/.jpeg/.png/.gif/.webp (≤10 MB). ActivityId is required.
Returns the learning material for a SelfPaced activity. Students must pass programEnrollmentId for enrollment-scoped access.
Updates the title of a material.
Soft-deletes the material and removes the corresponding file from S3.

Uploads an image (.jpg, .jpeg, .png) or video (.mp4, .mov) to an activity. Images are auto face-tagged immediately. Videos: raw upload + MediaConvert submit in one request; AWS SNS webhooks complete transcode and start Rekognition. Call POST /api/media/{mediaId}/process-tags to poll face tags if webhooks are delayed.
Retrieves all media assets for a specific activity, including face recognition tags.

Submits a new Rekognition face-search job on the transcoded video output, restarts label detection, then polls once for results. Returns 202 while VideoStatus is PendingTagging; call again until TaggingComplete.
Soft-deletes a media asset and removes the file from S3 storage.
Retrieve a paginated list of modules with optional search, filter, and sort options.
Creates a new module with the provided information. Requires SuperAdmin or Manager role.
Retrieve detailed information for a specific module by its ID.
Updates the details of a specific module by its ID. Requires SuperAdmin or Manager role.
Soft-deletes a module by its ID. Requires SuperAdmin or Manager role.
Retrieve a single module by its exact name (case-insensitive).
Creates a new module enrollment attempt after failing the module (two failed assignments). Requires Student role.
Retrieve a module enrollment. Students see their own; parents see linked students; admins see all.
Student initiates checkout for a paid program. Returns a hosted payment URL (Stripe or MoMo).
Student initiates checkout for a module retake fee. Returns a hosted payment URL.
Student sends a payment request email to a linked, verified parent. The parent receives a 24h payment link.
Student sends a payment request email to a linked, verified parent. The parent receives a 24h payment link for the module retake fee.
Parent uses the token from their email to initiate checkout. No authentication required — the token itself is the credential.
Receives checkout.session.completed events from Stripe. Must be registered in the Stripe dashboard.
Returns payment details. Available to authenticated users.

Called by the front-end when the user is redirected back to the cancelUrl. Marks the Payment as Cancelled and, if applicable, rolls back the parent's PaymentRequest to Pending so they can retry. Idempotent — safe to call multiple times.
Retrieve a paginated list of program information without modules. Supports search, filter, and sort options.
Creates a new program with the provided information. Requires SuperAdmin or Manager role.
Retrieve a paginated list of programs including their modules. Supports search, filter, and sort options.
Retrieve a compact curriculum outline for a program: modules, courses or milestones, activities, and materials.
Retrieve detailed information for a specific program by its ID.
Updates the details of a specific program by its ID. Requires SuperAdmin or Manager role.
Soft-deletes a program by its ID. Requires SuperAdmin or Manager role.
Retrieve a single program by its exact name (case-insensitive).
Retrieve a program enrollment. Students see their own; parents see linked students; admins see all.
Students: own enrollments. Parents: linked students. Admins: all enrollments.
Returns the active class cohort linked to this program enrollment. ClassId is null when the student has not joined a class yet. Students see their own; parents see linked students; admins see all.
Returns the curriculum tree with per-student activity status, module locks, and current activity.
Persists resume position (video time, PDF page, doc scroll) for an in-progress SelfPaced activity.
Marks a SelfPaced activity as done for the enrollment and returns updated progress.
List program enrollments for a student. Access rules apply per role (self, linked parent, or admin).
Allows an enrolled student to submit a star rating and optional comment for a program they are enrolled in. One review per student per program.
Retrieve a paginated list of reviews for the specified program. Supports sorting by createdAt (default) or starRating.
Allows the review owner to update their star rating or comment. Both fields are optional (partial update).
Soft-deletes a review. The review owner, SuperAdmin, or Manager may call this endpoint.
Retrieve a question bank by its ID.
Soft-deletes a question bank and its questions. Requires SuperAdmin or Manager role.
Creates a new question bank for a course. Requires SuperAdmin or Manager role.
Soft-deletes a question and its options from a question bank. Requires SuperAdmin or Manager role.
Parses a CSV file and imports valid question rows into the specified question bank. Invalid rows are skipped and returned in the error list. Requires SuperAdmin or Manager role.
Starts a new Mode A quiz attempt or resumes an existing Pending submission. Requires Student role and an active enrollment in the assignment's module.
Returns quiz questions and saved answers for a Pending submission. Requires Student role.
Upserts draft answers for a Pending submission. Partial answers are allowed. Requires Student role.

Final submit: merges request answers with saved drafts, validates all questions are answered, auto-grades, and sets submission to Graded. An empty answers array is allowed when all drafts are saved. Requires Student role.
Returns the graded result for a submission. Requires Student role.
Creates a research milestone and its linked deliverable assignment. Requires SuperAdmin or Manager.
Lists all research milestones for a module, ordered by MilestoneOrder.
Retrieve a research milestone (includes assignment and linked activities).
Updates milestone fields and the linked deliverable assignment. Requires SuperAdmin or Manager.
Soft-deletes a milestone (and its linked assignment) when no submissions exist. Requires SuperAdmin or Manager.
Links an existing activity to a milestone with required flag and display order. Requires SuperAdmin, Manager, or Mentor.
Updates required flag and/or display order for the activity link. Requires SuperAdmin, Manager, or Mentor.
Removes (soft-deletes) the activity link from the milestone. Requires SuperAdmin, Manager, or Mentor.
Returns per-milestone unlock and submission readiness for a module enrollment. Access is enforced per role.
Mentor, Manager, or SuperAdmin opens a submission slot for a student on a research milestone. The student can then submit work within the assignment availability window.
Returns a research milestone submission. Access is enforced per role.

Uploads a deliverable or evidence file to S3 only (no DB write). Returns CreateResearchSubmissionRequestDto with FileUrl or EvidenceUrls for use in submit. Set isEvidence=true for supporting evidence files.
Student submits research deliverable content in a single action. No draft saving. Resubmission after ReturnedForRevision does not require mentor to reopen.
Mentor, Manager, or SuperAdmin grades a turned-in submission or returns it for revision.
Creates a new Pending submission or resumes an existing draft or revision. Requires Student role and an active enrollment in the assignment's module.
Returns plain-text content and status for a retrospective submission. Students may only access their own submission.
Autosaves plain-text draft content for a Pending or ReturnedForRevision submission.
Final submit: merges optional request text with the saved draft, requires non-empty plain text, and sets submission to TurnedIn for mentor grading.
Seeds all database tables with sample data. Run DELETE /api/seed/clear first when resetting dev data.
Removes all application data from the database (PostgreSQL TRUNCATE CASCADE). EF migration history is preserved.
Returns attendance records for a class session. Students receive only their own record; mentors, managers, and super admins receive the full roster.
Upserts one student's attendance for a class session. Requires Mentor, Manager, or SuperAdmin role.
